en.extract:
The mountain peltops (Peltops montanus) is a species of bird in the family Cracticidae. It is found in Indonesia and Papua New Guinea. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''mountain peltops''' ('''''Peltops montanus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Cracticidae]]. It is found in [[Indonesia]] and [[Papua New Guinea]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
